commit.message:
fix: resolve critical and high npm vulnerabilities

- Override undici 7.22.0 → 7.24.1 (fixes GHSA-f269, GHSA-2mjp, GHSA-vrm6, GHSA-v9p9, GHSA-4992, GHSA-phc3)
- Override swiper 11.2.10 → 12.1.2 (fixes GHSA-hmx5 prototype pollution via adaptivecards)
- npm audit now reports 0 vulnerabilities

commit.message:
fix: address code review feedback

- SettingsView: replace broken Toggle+constant with a Button that directly
  opens system notification settings (Toggle was bound to .constant(true)
  and onChange never fired)
- HTTPClient: append query parameters to URL for GET requests instead of
  putting them in the request body (body is ignored for GET)
- PushNotificationService: document why info-severity alerts skip Live Activities
- NotificationsViewModel: document polling page-reset behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: mayday
repository.description: The app you hope you never get a notification from

commit.message:
feat: add complete Mayday iOS Xcode project

- Swift 6, SwiftUI, MVVM + async/await architecture
- iOS 17.0 minimum deployment target
- Two targets: Mayday app + MaydayLiveActivity widget extension
- Models: UserResponse, TokenPair, AppNotification, SessionResponse, AlertAttributes
- Services: HTTPClient (actor), AuthService, KeychainService, NotificationsAPIService, PushNotificationService
- ViewModels: AuthViewModel, NotificationsViewModel, SettingsViewModel
- Views: Login/Register/VerifyEmail, NotificationsList/Detail, Settings/ChangePassword/Sessions
- APNs push notifications with UIApplicationDelegate
- ActivityKit Live Activities for Dynamic Island + Lock Screen
- Keychain (Security framework) token storage
- 30-second polling with pagination for notifications
- Xcode project file (project.pbxproj) with correct build phases for both targets

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: prevent grouping consecutive code blocks with the same language (#667)

* fix: prevent grouping consecutive code blocks with the same language

Two consecutive code blocks with the same language (e.g., both `mjs`)
were incorrectly grouped into a CJS/MJS switchable tab. Add a check
to ensure the two code blocks have different languages before creating
a switchable code tab.

Refs: https://github.com/nodejs/node/pull/62181

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add optional chaining for defensive null safety

* fix: update to assume [0] and [1] always exist

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix falsy enum values returning None instead of name

AlarmReason.NO_ALARM has value 0, making it falsy in Python. The
_enum_to_lowercase function used 'if enum_value' which incorrectly
returned None for NO_ALARM. Changed to 'if enum_value is not None'
to properly handle zero-valued Flag enums.

This caused battery_monitor alarm and dc_energy_meter alarm to show
as 'unknown' instead of 'no_alarm' in Home Assistant.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add AC charger (smart charger) support

Add support for AcCharger device type (BLE record type 0x08), which
covers Blue Smart IP22/IP65, Phoenix Smart IP43, and other Victron
AC charger models.

New sensor keys: AC_CURRENT, OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_1-3, OUTPUT_CURRENT_1-3.
Existing keys reused: CHARGE_STATE, CHARGER_ERROR, TEMPERATURE.

Also adds snapshot tests for all 8 supported device types.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Adopt Anna's site design with all integrations re-applied

- Replaced site with Anna's version (schedule, route map, FAQ, gallery, about section)
- Re-added GA4 tracking (G-B08WPFHX9Q) with form event tracking
- Re-added Open Graph + Twitter Card meta tags
- Re-added MailerLite signup form wired to Cloudflare Worker
- Re-added contact form with field names/IDs and submit handler
- Re-added logo (navbar + footer) with favicon
- 48 images from Anna's design (32 gallery, maps, about, signup, etc.)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Refresh all icons to Fluent 2 design + update Dynamics 365 collection

- Refresh 32 CDN icons from _48x1 (old flat) to _24x1 (Fluent 2 design)
- Replace 10 Dynamics 365 icons with official scalable SVGs
- Add 6 new Dynamics products: Contact Center, Customer Insights, Finance & Operations, Human Resources, Intelligent Order Management, Sales Insights
- Add missing products: Calendar, Admin Center, Viva Home
- Remove retired products: Fraud Protection (EOL Feb 2026), Guides (EOL Dec 2026), Remote Assist (EOL Dec 2026), Kaizala (retired 2023)
- Fix To Do icon filename (to-do -> todo) to match CDN
- Regenerate all PNGs at 512x512
- Update icons.json, index.html, and README.md (79 icons total)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix logo visibility: invert to white on dark backgrounds

Navbar and footer both have dark maroon backgrounds. Logo is maroon on
transparent, making it invisible. Apply brightness(0) invert(1) CSS filter
to render the logo white in both locations.

commit.message:
Add logo, GA4 tracking, MailerLite integration, and production readiness

- Add March for Jesus logo to navbar, hero, and footer
- Generate favicon (32px and 180px) from logo
- Add Google Analytics GA4 snippet (G-B08WPFHX9Q)
- Add GA4 event tracking for form submissions (generate_lead, contact)
- Add Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags for social sharing
- Add canonical URL meta tag
- Create CNAME for marchforjesus.co.uk custom domain
- Expand email signup form: first name, last name, email, phone, church
- Wire both forms to Cloudflare Worker proxy (mfj-mailerlite-proxy)
- Create Cloudflare Worker for secure MailerLite API integration
- Forms submit to MailerLite group: MFJ UK 2026 website (Github)
- Remove placeholder SVG files (real photos already in place)
- Add .gitignore for design assets and temp files

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: dynamic method and status badge colors in request view

- Add MethodColor property to RequestViewModel: color-codes the HTTP
  method ComboBox foreground per verb (GET=teal, POST=amber, PUT=blue,
  PATCH=green, DELETE=red, HEAD=purple, OPTIONS=gray)
- Add StatusBadgeColor property: response status badge background
  changes to green (2xx), amber (3xx), red (4xx/5xx) on each response
- Add HexColorToBrushConverter to convert hex color strings to IBrush
  for use in compiled AXAML bindings
- Bind both properties in RequestView.axaml via the new converter
- Exclude new computed properties from dirty-change tracking

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Bump dependencies in provisioning generator (#57077)

* Bump mgmt generator dependencies to 1.0.0-alpha.20260313.1

Update @azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt npm dependency and
AzureManagementGeneratorVersion NuGet property to 1.0.0-alpha.20260313.1.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Bump Azure generator dependency in mgmt to 1.0.0-alpha.20260312.1

Update @azure-typespec/http-client-csharp in http-client-csharp-mgmt and
AzureGeneratorVersion NuGet property from 1.0.0-alpha.20260310.3 to
1.0.0-alpha.20260312.1.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Revert changes to mgmt emitter package files

These files should not be updated in this PR.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Bump mgmt generator dependency in provisioning to 1.0.0-alpha.20260313.1

Update @azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt in http-client-csharp-provisioning
from 1.0.0-alpha.20260308.1 to 1.0.0-alpha.20260313.1.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update mgmt generator package-lock.json after npm install

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix provisioning generator npm ci: bump devDeps and add overrides

Bump devDependencies to match mgmt generator versions (0.66.x/1.10.0/0.80.x)
and add npm overrides to resolve transitive peer dependency conflicts from
@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt@1.0.0-alpha.20260313.1.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix provisioning generator: bump devDeps and regenerate lockfile

Bump devDependencies to match mgmt generator versions (0.66.x/1.10.0/0.80.x)
and remove overrides. Regenerate lockfile cleanly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove overrides from provisioning package.json

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Pin @typespec/http-client-csharp in mgmt devDeps to fix build

Pin @typespec/http-client-csharp@1.0.0-alpha.20260312.1 in devDependencies
to match the transitive version from @azure-typespec/http-client-csharp,
preventing duplicate type declarations that caused TS2322.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Revert mgmt generator changes, keep only provisioning bump

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Revert AzureGeneratorVersion back to 1.0.0-alpha.20260310.3

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Rename ResourceMetadata to ArmResourceMetadata in provisioning generator

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* update

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: nuxt-layers-component-lib-poc
repository.description: POC: Vue 3 component library consumed in Nuxt via Nuxt Layers — with CSS tree-shaking, multi-theme design tokens, and zero consumer config

commit.message:
feat: initial POC — Nuxt Layers + Vue component library with themes and CSS tree-shaking

- @poc/design-tokens: Style Dictionary with 3 themes (default, ocean, forest)
- @poc/ui-components: plain Vue 3 lib with Vite multi-entry + cssCodeSplit
- @poc/nuxt-layer: Nuxt Layer with defineNuxtModule, addComponent auto-discovery
- Theme selection via uiComponents: { theme } module option in nuxt.config.ts
- Only active theme CSS loaded (build-time tree-shaking)
- data-theme on <html> via runtimeConfig.public bridge
- pnpm workspaces monorepo

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
